description: Optimize headlines for 5 use cases using Schwartz awareness-matched patterns and Bencivenga precision craft

voice_references.pattern_source: eugene_schwartz — 127 headline patterns, awareness-level matching, picture words

eval_criteria.specificity: Are there concrete numbers, timeframes, or outcomes? (1-10)
eval_criteria.curiosity: Does it create an information gap that demands resolution? (1-10)
eval_criteria.awareness_match: Does the headline match the market's awareness level correctly? (1-10)

mutation_strategy: Identify which Schwartz patterns score highest across runs, lean into those patterns while mutating weak dimensions
